use_cases: Form submissions and user actions with multiple visual variants
Primary and secondary call-to-action buttons in web interfaces
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and compact UI sections
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Ghost and link buttons for secondary navigation actions
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features standard hover focus-visible states and supports composition via asChild prop. Designed as an atomic building block for SaaS and dev-tool interfaces requiring consistent button styling across forms, CTAs, and navigation elements.
